title: platystele altarica
intro: Platystele altarica, also known as the altarica orchid, is a species of epiphytic orchid native to Central America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Platystele altarica include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of various conditions. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal remedies, such as infusions and decoctions, which are consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
